title: koenigia coriaria
intro: Koenigia coriaria, also known as the Indian knotweed or Himalayan knotweed, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Koenigia coriaria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Koenigia coriaria can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
